text: Dort To Hawks, Risacher To Mavericks In Three-Team Trade - Hoops Rumors
fullText: The Thunder are trading Lu Dort to the Hawks in a three-team deal that will send Zaccharie Risacher to Dallas.

text: Usha Vance gives birth to fourth child - NBC News
fullText: Second lady Usha Vance gave birth Sunday to her fourth child, Vance’s office announced on X. “We are excited to announce that our baby boy, Alec Neel Vance, was born this morning,” the Vance family said in a statement.

text: Spain is the 2026 World Cup champion, defeating Argentina for its 2nd title - NPR
fullText: Spain's run to the title was a defensive masterclass, with wins over four of the world's top ten teams. They are the first World Cup champion to win the title while only conceding a single goal.

text: Andrew and Tristan Tate arrested on rape, trafficking charges. What to know. - The Washington Post
fullText: The brothers, who built a massive social media empire championing hyper-masculinity, were arrested in Miami after British authorities filed the new charges against them.

text: FIFA Halftime: Blink and You Missed Madonna, BTS, Justin Bieber, Shakira - Variety
fullText: Madonna, BTS, Justin Bieber and Shakira all got two minutes or less of screen time each in the FIFA World Cup Final's very crowded halftime show.

text: The Open 2026 recap: Ryan Fox wins the 154th Open Championship! - Golf Channel
fullText: Fox's victory marked just the third time in history a Kiwi took home the claret jug.

text: FBI will no longer investigate ICE confrontations, The New York Times reports - CNBC
fullText: The Department of Justice and the Department of Homeland Security have both denied that any change in oversight has taken place.

text: Gunther vs. Nick Aldis set for SummerSlam after Fanatics Fest brawl - Cageside Seats
fullText: Even Triple H couldn’t keep them apart, and the grudge match is official for Minneapolis.

text: Nine people injured in Arizona shooting; suspect shot by police - CBS News
fullText: Nine people were shot and injured in a shooting in Tucson, Arizona, early Sunday morning, police said. A suspected gunman was shot and wounded by police.

text: Troy Jackson has effectively secured the Maine Senate Democratic nomination - Politico
fullText: Jackson’s preferred delegates have won a majority of the seats at next week’s nominating convention to replace Graham Platner.

text: Live updates: Iran war news; US troop deaths raise fears of a wider war as Iran hit by new strikes - CNN
fullText: An American service member was killed in Iraq on Saturday, the US military said a day after announcing two troops died in an Iranian attack in Jordan. Follow live updates.

text: 'The Odyssey' opens with $264.1 million globally, besting 'Oppenheimer' debut - AP News
fullText: Christopher Nolan’s “The Odyssey” launched with an estimated $124.5 million in domestic ticket sales and another $139.6 million from overseas, even better than the filmmaker's “Oppenheimer” debut. The weekend tally marked Nolan's best opening since “The Dark …

text: 'Real Housewives Of Orange County' Star Jeana Keough Diagnosed With Tongue Cancer At 70 - Deadline
fullText: Jeana Keough, one of the OG stars of The Real Housewives of Orange County, has been diagnosed with tongue cancer at the age of 70, her daughter confirmed.

text: Russian attacks kill 6 in Kyiv and other cities and expose gaps in Ukraine’s air defenses - AP News
fullText: Russia has attacked Kyiv and other Ukrainian cities with missiles, drones and bombs, killing at least six people. Dozens are wounded. The strikes highlight Ukraine's shortage of U.S.-made Patriot air defense systems. Moscow has increased missile use to counte…

text: A century-old stellar mystery may finally have an explanation - Phys.org
fullText: For more than a century, astronomers have puzzled over a strange discrepancy in the historical record. Theta Eridani, a modest star in the constellation Eridanus, is the third-brightest star in its constellation, with a magnitude of 2.9. But ancient astronome…

text: Who is Andy Burnham, the U.K.'s new prime minister? - NPR
fullText: On Monday, former Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham succeeds Keir Starmer as the United Kingdom's prime minister. Burnham's politics have been shaped by England's north-south class divide.
